result:
Validation lives in `repo/app/service.py` at the service layer, per the layering convention (not in the API or store).

`_validate_title` (line 37) does two checks:
1. Rejects `None` or whitespace-only strings with `"title is required"`.
2. Rejects strings longer than `MAX_TITLE_LEN` (200, line 9) with `"title too long"`.

It then returns the stripped value. `create_task` (line 50) calls it before touching the store. There is no client-side validation in `repo/web/app.js`; it passes the title straight to the API.
